picks.rationale: Q4 FY26 EPS $0.11 vs $0.08 est (+42% surp), Rev $185.2M (+4.6% YoY). Usage-based CPaaS revenue grew +70% YoY. FY27 EPS guided to $0.33-0.38 (+35% YoY). Strong pivot to usage-based models driving a multi-month turnaround.
Q1 26 EPS $0.13 (reversing PY -$1.13), Rev $378.3M (+37.7% YoY). Restaurant margins rebounded to 14.8% (best since 2021). Classic turnaround setup for a low-float micro-cap restaurant chain.
Q1 26 EPS $0.20 (+4.7% surp), Rev $438.3M (+79.8% YoY). Same-store sales +9.7% with top-tier 27.1% margins. FY26 comp guidance raised to +9-11%. High quality institutional accumulation setup.
Completed BDBV Ebola virus test development strategy. Trading on massive relative volume (12.5M shares). Pure momentum and sentiment play.
Form 4 insider buying and recent $15.65M private placement. Extremely low float Chinese e-commerce play showing strong pre-market momentum.

Q3 FY26 EPS $0.27 (+17% surp) and Rev $406.8M were strong, but suffering a hard 'sell-the-news' reaction. Cash drain from $150M Term B prepayment raises short-term liquidity concerns. Gap down continuation setup.
